programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.sub-title: West Indies v Sri Lanka-2nd Test, Day Two
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the second day of the Second and Final Test in the series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. This is just the 12th series between the two countries in this format and before this series the hosts had only won two of those. The West Indies had also only won four times in the 24 Test matches played against Sri Lanka coming into this two-match contest, with the first being played back in December 1993.

programme.desc: Chicago Cubs v St. Louis Cardinals (Start-time 7.30pm). Coverage of the National League match from Wrigley Field, as the sides play the third and final game of the series.
